source: 用户提供的 Chrome 应用商店购物分类页面文本

items.name: Honey: Automated Coupons & Rewards
items.description: Save money and earn rewards when you shop online.

items.name: Keepa™ - Amazon Price Tracker
items.description: Adds price history charts and the option to be alerted on price drops to all supported Amazon sites.

items.name: Rakuten: Get Cash Back For Shopping
items.description: Activate & earn Cash Back directly on store sites. We do all the work. You just shop and save. Earn Cash Back at 3,500 stores today!

items.name: Coupert - 自动查找测试应用优惠券
items.description: 自动查找优惠券，应用最优优惠码，并赚取返现奖励，为您的网上购物省钱。

items.name: Cashback service LetyShops
items.description: Get cashback for shopping online with LetyShops!

items.name: Smarty
items.description: Add coupon codes & get cash back when shopping online! By installing, you agree to the terms at joinsmarty.com

items.name: Buyhatke: Price History & Tracker, Spend Lens
items.description: Buyhatke—Track price history, compare prices, find auto coupons, get alerts & save big with Spend Lens while shopping online.

items.name: SteamDB
items.description: 在 Steam 商店和社区页面中添加 SteamDB 链接和新功能，可查阅游戏史低价格和在线统计数据。

items.name: RetailMeNot: Codes, Cash Back and Coupons
items.description: Automatically finds the best promo codes and cash back as you shop online.

items.name: wanteeed
items.description: Wanteeed permet d'appliquer automatiquement les meilleures réductions pour des centaines de sites marchands

items.name: Karma | Online shopping, but better
items.description: Shop Smarter: Compare Prices, Get Coupons, Price alerts & Earn Cash Back!

items.name: iGraal | Shopping with Savings
items.description: Don’t look for discounts anymore! iGraal finds the best ones for you.

items.name: Alitools Shopping Assistant
items.description: Auto-find & apply AliExpress ™ promo codes, price history, seller rating, similar products, find item by picture

items.name: Augmented Steam
items.description: Augments your Steam Experience

items.name: Mino: Automatic Coupons & Cash Back
items.description: Mino automatically applies the best coupon codes at checkout and gets you the most Cash Back!

items.name: Pie Shopping: AI Cash Back and Coupons
items.description: Save money effortlessly with Pie Shopping: activate Cash Back, auto-apply coupons, and use our AI side panel for smart deals!

items.name: Add to Babylist Button
items.description: Add items to your Babylist registry from any store.

items.name: Joko: Cash back & automatic coupons
items.description: Earn money effortlessly with the Joko browser extension!

items.name: RoEarn: Roblox 购买返现
items.description: 在 Roblox 上的每次购买都能获得 Robux 返现！

items.name: ID.me Shop: Discover Community Discounts
items.description: Let the ID.me Shop browser extension find Military, Nurse, Teacher, Responder discounts and more while you shop.

items.name: 1688采购助手插件版
items.description: 1688采购助手插件是阿里巴巴旗下官方电商采购工具，支持一键截图找同款，上下游图搜比价；支持商品素材下载，提供商品销量和价格走势、旺旺消息/订单消息/供应商新品等通知信息、各类商机榜单和趋势热点，还有AI辅助找挑、图片素材优化，帮助您的采购流程更加便捷高效透明。

items.name: Add to MyRegistry.com Button
items.description: Add items from all your favorite stores to one universal gift list.

items.name: Qantas Shopping Points-Prompter
items.description: Browser extension for Qantas shopping

items.name: AiPrice(AliPrice)跨境卖家辅助工具
items.description: AiPrice跨境卖家辅助工具可以让你轻松地在跨境电商网站上找到同款货源。

items.name: BeFrugal: Automatic Coupons and Cash Back
items.description: Get the highest Cash Back and automatically apply best coupons at over 5,000 stores and restaurants!

items.name: AliHelper – 购物助手，适用于 AliExpress ™
items.description: 适用于 AliExpress ™ 的优惠券代码、价格历史、卖家评级、带图评价、包裹追踪和折扣

items.name: TopCashback USA Get Cash Back & Coupons
items.description: Join over 25m members worldwide and earn money back when you shop online with the TopCashback browser extension!

items.name: AliSave Plus - Download AliExpress Images
items.description: Download Aliexpress Product Images & Videos. The most popular tool for AliExpress!

items.name: Rabatta
items.description: Save money with discount codes from Rabatta.

items.name: Share-A-Cart – 轻松分享购物车
items.description: Share-A-Cart 允许您与他人共享购物车.

items.name: Alibaba Lens: Official Alibaba.com Image Search Tool for Wholesale Supply
items.description: Alibaba Lens：搜索电商平台商品的新方式

items.name: AiPrice(AliPrice) - TB以图搜同款
items.description: AiPrice以图搜同款神器可以让你轻松地在跨境电商网站上找到同款货源。

items.name: AiPrice(AliPrice)中国进口图片搜索
items.description: AiPrice以图搜货神器可以让你轻松地在跨境电商网站上找到同款货源。

items.name: 1688遨虾：AI跨境选品与图搜找厂
items.description: 1688官方AI助手：截图一键找同款货源，智能分析亚马逊数据，极速对接源头工厂。

items.name: SimplyCodes: Verified Coupon Codes by Real Shoppers
items.description: Verified promo codes for 400,000+ stores. Real shoppers test codes in real time so you save with confidence. Always privacy-first.

items.name: Tenere
items.description: Automatically apply coupon codes when you shop and plant trees on your behalf.

items.name: Checkmate - Save While You Shop.
items.description: Automatically apply coupons, track your orders, and unlock exclusive deals!

items.name: Molly
items.description: Molly finder automatisk bedre priser, rabatkoder og advarer dig mod dårlige anmeldelser, når du shopper online.

items.name: Trustpilot: Reviews & Ratings
items.description: See if a website is trustworthy without leaving the page.

items.name: EuroSaver - Amazon Europe Price Comparison
items.description: Simplifies comparing Amazon product prices across all European stores.

items.name: UpSeller - 产品采集插件
items.description: 从主流电商平台采集产品并发布到你的店铺

items.name: AliExpress - 以图搜图
items.description: 通过图片或屏幕区域选择在AliExpress上搜索商品

items.name: Widilo - Cashback et Codes Promo
items.description: Widilo t'alerte en temps réel du cashback et des codes promo dispo sur tes sites marchands préférés.

items.name: Giftful
items.description: The easiest way to add wishes to your giftful wishlists!

items.name: LoveDeals: Automatic Coupons & Deals
items.description: LoveDeals: AI-Powered Coupon Extension / Finder

items.name: BestPrice Assistant
items.description: Ο έξυπνος βοηθός στις ηλεκτρονικές σου αγορές που θα σε βοηθήσει να κερδίσεις χρόνο και χρήμα!

items.name: Shopilo: Automatic Coupon Finder by DontPayFull
items.description: Automatically finds coupons and applies the best coupon code at checkout.

items.name: AT Price Tracker
items.description: Show price history on Autotrader UK and track price changes automatically

items.name: Moonsift: Wishlist & Gift List Maker
items.description: Save products from any store in the world. Curate and share your own shoppable collections, gift registries, and wish lists.

items.name: AMZ Downloader - Amazon Videos and Images Downloader
items.description: Downloads Amazon product and variations images and videos and exports links to CSV.

items.name: eBay Sold History Button - See Item Purchase History
items.description: Add a 'HISTORY' button to the title on eBay product pages, to open purchase history. Quickly access it with a shortcut key!

items.name: 货币转换器 PRO
items.description: 用于在线购物和旅行的货币转换器，具有实时汇率、自动检测、百分比和灵活设置。

items.name: Property Tracker
items.description: Tracks changes to property prices on the RightMove website.

items.name: Coupert Pure: AI-Powered Coupons & Price Compare
items.description: Your AI shopping assistant. Shop smarter, save more.

items.name: 价格跟踪器 2.0 - 价格图表和自动购买
items.description: 价格跟踪器 2.0 - 价格历史图表、自动购买产品、在购物网站上设置降价警报

items.name: FatCoupon Cashback & Promo Codes
items.description: Shop with the FatCoupon extension for cashback and automatic coupons at over 12,000 stores.

items.name: Navigate Rewards
items.description: Turn Your Web Browsing into Rewards!

items.name: Extension Club R
items.description: Avec l’extension Club R, Rakuten recompense automatiquement vos achats sur des milliers de sites partenaires

items.name: Flash AI - Unbiased Reviews. Lowest Prices
items.description: Instant, unbiased product clarity with reviews and real-time prices.

items.name: Alibaba Search by image
items.description: Quickly search Alibaba for any image you see while browsing!

items.name: Cuponation | Shopping with Savings
items.description: Don’t look for discounts anymore! Cuponation finds the best ones for you.

items.name: Myibidder Auction Bid Sniper for eBay
items.description: This extension places a 'Snipe it' link on eBay listings for easy access to Myibidder.com Auction Bid Sniper.

items.name: The RebatesMe Cash Back Button
items.description: Automatically Finds You The Highest Cash Back Rate

items.name: Allkeyshop - Compare Game Prices
items.description: Shows you the best deals and discount coupons available while you're surfing on the web
